alerts.source: United Arab Emirates Ministry of Defence
alerts.title: UAE Air Defenses Engage Iranian Missile and Drone Attack
alerts.description: UAE air defenses engaged 17 Iranian ballistic missiles and 35 UAVs. Cumulative statistics show 537 ballistic missiles, 26 cruise missiles, and 2256 UAVs detected since onset of Iranian aggression.

alerts.source: United Arab Emirates Ministry of Defence
alerts.title: UAE Air Defenses Engage 17 Ballistic Missiles and 35 UAVs
alerts.description: UAE air defense successfully engaged 17 ballistic missiles and 35 UAVs launched from Iran on April 8, 2026. Since Iranian attacks began, UAE has engaged 537 ballistic missiles, 26 cruise missiles, and 2,256 UAVs total. 3 minor injuries reported today, bringing total injuries to 224.

alerts.source: United Arab Emirates Ministry of Defence
alerts.title: UAE Air Defenses Intercept Iranian Attack
alerts.description: UAE air defenses successfully intercepted 17 ballistic missiles and 35 drones from Iran. Since Iranian attacks began, UAE has intercepted 537 ballistic missiles, 26 cruise missiles, and 2256 drones. Total casualties: 3 injuries, 224 injuries overall, 10 civilians killed.

alerts.source: United Arab Emirates Ministry of Defence
alerts.title: UAE Air Defenses Engaging Iranian Missile and Drone Attacks
alerts.description: UAE air defense systems are actively intercepting ballistic missiles, cruise missiles and drones launched from Iran. Sounds heard across the country are from ongoing air defense operations.

alerts.title: UAE Air Defenses Engaging Iranian Missile and Drone Attacks
